scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend,scheduler -c cyan,magenta,yellow "cd backend && npm run dev" "cd frontend && npm run dev" "cd backend && npm run scheduler"
scripts.dev:with-seed: npm run seed && npm run dev
scripts.deploy: npm --prefix frontend run build && pm2 startOrRestart ecosystem.config.cjs --update-env && pm2 save && sudo nginx -t && sudo systemctl reload nginx
scripts.prod:backend:ngrok: concurrently -n backend,ngrok -c cyan,green "cd backend && NODE_ENV=production npm start" "ngrok start saathi"
